generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated lighting system controller integrated with BIM model that executes control logic derived from the Digital Twin, enabling bidirectional communication with physical lighting fixtures via Eclipse Hono middleware."
]

instance HVACController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building HVAC system controller configured through the Digital Twin to manage temperature setpoints, ventilation rates, and energy consumption based on real-time operational data."
]

instance OccupancyBasedWindowSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Automated window system that adjusts position based on occupancy patterns and environmental conditions, controlled through the Digital Twin's runtime interface."
]

instance EnergyMonitoringActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Energy consumption monitoring and control actuator that interfaces with the Digital Twin to optimize energy distribution across building systems."
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded occupancy sensor in building infrastructure that detects presence via infrared or ultrasonic technology, transmitting real-time occupancy data to the Digital Twin via MQTT protocol."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor measuring temperature and humidity levels, semantically annotated in BIM model to map data to corresponding virtual components in the Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance LightLevelSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Light intensity sensor embedded in building infrastructure that provides real-time luminosity data for visual comfort optimization and energy management."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyMonitor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Building energy consumption monitor that tracks real-time energy usage across systems, transmitting aggregated data to the Digital Twin for analytics."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

instance PermafrostTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Specialized temperature sensor for monitoring critical infrastructure components, ensuring data integrity through BIM-based semantic annotation."
    DTDFVocab:producedData CriticalInfrastructureDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction
instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureHumiditySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightLevelSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyMonitor
]

instance CriticalInfrastructureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PermafrostTemperatureSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BuildingInformationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic-rich 3D BIM model representing building geometry, topology, and component relationships with embedded device metadata and control logic annotations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMModelDrivenPipeline
]

instance RuntimeDataSchemaModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model-driven transformation output defining data schemas for sensor readings, control commands, and system states used to configure Eclipse Hono/Ditto middleware."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MiddlewareConfiguration
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Domain-specific policy models including lighting schedules, HVAC setpoints, and reinforcement learning policies integrated via BOREALIS framework."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningService
]

instance VisualizationAssetModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D assets and interactive interfaces for Unreal Engine 5 rendering of Digital Twin including real-time sensor data overlays and control dashboards."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngineVisualization
]

instance OperationalDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Historical and real-time operational data repository storing energy consumption logs, occupancy patterns, and system performance metrics synchronized with physical building."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalDataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance SensorMetadataModel : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Extracted metadata from BIM model including device IDs, endpoint addresses, and semantic annotations for sensor configurations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData CriticalInfrastructureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MiddlewareConfiguration
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMModelDrivenPipeline : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering pipeline automating extraction of domain semantics from BIM models and generating runtime artifacts via model-to-model transformations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RuntimeArtifactGenerationService
]

instance MiddlewareConfiguration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware platform providing real-time data exchange, device management, and scalable event-driven processing for bidirectional communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing high-fidelity 3D visualization and interactive interfaces for monitoring building operations in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS reinforcement learning framework enabling adaptive control policies for optimizing energy consumption and occupant comfort."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ODTEValidationFramework : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Overall Digital Twin Entanglement metric system validating DT fidelity by quantifying alignment between virtual and physical representations."
    DTDFVocab:enables ValidationAndOptimizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization service displaying building operations through Unreal Engine 5 with real-time sensor data overlays and system performance metrics."
    DTDFVocab:provides OccupantComfortInsight, EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service integrating reinforcement learning models to optimize energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects based on post-occupancy data."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationAction, OccupantHealthAction
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating runtime interfaces for bidirectional communication between Digital Twin and physical systems, reducing manual configuration efforts."
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemConfigurationAction
]

instance ModularServiceExtensionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing standardized extension points for integrating custom services like energy management or predictive maintenance via service-oriented architecture."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomServiceIntegrationAction
]

instance RuntimeArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service automating generation of middleware configurations and visualization scripts from BIM models to support multi-project deployments."
    DTDFVocab:provides ConfigurationAutomationAction
]

instance ValidationAndOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service continuously improving Digital Twin through iterative validation of control logic, sensor configurations, and visualization parameters."
    DTDFVocab:provides FidelityOptimizationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OccupantComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights into occupant comfort levels derived from lighting, temperature, and occupancy data for adaptive control policies."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for optimizing energy consumption across building systems through real-time monitoring and predictive analytics."
]

instance OccupantHealthAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment of lighting and environmental conditions to balance visual comfort with non-visual health effects using reinforcement learning."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnergyOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time adjustments to lighting, HVAC, and shading systems for cost-effective operation and occupant comfort optimization."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation and deployment of runtime interfaces for bidirectional communication between Digital Twin and physical control systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomServiceIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Integration of third-party services like energy management or predictive maintenance through standardized extension points in the Digital Twin framework."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ConfigurationAutomationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated extraction of sensor metadata and generation of middleware configurations from BIM models to support scalable deployments."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FidelityOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Iterative improvements to Digital Twin's accuracy through validation of control logic, sensor configurations, and visualization parameters."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LightingController, HVACController, OccupancyBasedWindowSystem, EnergyMonitoringActuator,
                  OccupancySensor, TemperatureHumiditySensor, LightLevelSensor, EnergyMonitor,
                  PermafrostTemperatureSensor
]

instance DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains BuildingInformationModel, RuntimeDataSchemaModel, ControlLogicModel,
                  VisualizationAssetModel, OperationalDataStore, SensorMetadataModel,
                  BIMModelDrivenPipeline, MiddlewareConfiguration, UnrealEngineVisualization,
                  ReinforcementLearningService, ODTEValidationFramework
]

instance ServiceIntegrationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService,
                  AutomatedCommissioningService, ModularServiceExtensionService,
                  RuntimeArtifactGenerationService, ValidationAndOptimizationService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction is achieved through **control logic and actuation commands** generated by the DT and transmitted back to physical actuators via the middleware (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). The DT processes real-time data and applies control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting, occupancy-based HVAC adjustments) to generate control signals. These signals are sent to actuators (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC units) through standardized interfaces, enabling **real-time operational adjustments**. The framework supports **bidirectional communication** between the DT and physical systems, allowing for closed-loop control and optimization of building operations. The BIM model is used to define actuator configurations and control logic, ensuring alignment between virtual commands and physical responses."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with synchronization and service execution occurring at **millisecond to second intervals** to ensure operational relevance. Key temporal characteristics include:
  - **Sensor data sampling rates**: Typically **1–10 Hz** for environmental and occupancy sensors, enabling **low-latency updates** to the DT,
  - **Control loop execution**: **Sub-second latency** for actuator commands (e.g., HVAC adjustments, lighting control) to maintain **responsive feedback**,
  - **Visualization refresh rates**: **60 FPS** for Unreal Engine-based interfaces to provide **smooth, interactive monitoring**,
  - **Asynchronous/synchronous patterns**: **Event-driven updates** for sensor data (e.g., occupancy changes) and **periodic polling** for stable metrics (e.g., energy consumption),
  - **Predictive analytics intervals**: **Dynamic time windows** (e.g., hourly/daily aggregates) for RL-based optimization (e.g., BOREALIS) to balance **real-time responsiveness** with **long-term performance tuning**."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented, modular architecture** with the following components:
   - **BIM Backbone**: The central semantic foundation linking physical and virtual representations. It defines the **device configurations**, **control logic**, and **spatial relationships** that underpin the DT.
   - **Middleware Layer (Eclipse Hono/Ditto)**: Facilitates **real-time data exchange** between the DT and physical systems, including sensor data ingestion and control command execution. It also handles **device authentication**, **data normalization**, and **event routing**.
   - **Control Services**: Domain-specific services (e.g., lighting control, HVAC optimization) that process real-time data and generate control actions. These services are **modular and extensible**, allowing for custom implementations (e.g., reinforcement learning policies).
   - **Visualization Layer (Unreal Engine 5)**: Provides an **immersive interface** for stakeholders to interact with the DT, including real-time monitoring, simulation, and control. It integrates with the middleware to display live sensor data and system states.
   - **Extension Points**: Standardized interfaces for integrating **third-party services** (e.g., predictive maintenance, energy analytics) without disrupting the core DT functionality. These points enable **plug-and-play** integration of new capabilities.
   The constellation is designed for **scalability**, allowing the DT to grow from a single building to an entire infrastructure portfolio by replicating and interconnecting modular DT instances."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT operates across **multiple life cycle stages** of the building, from **design to operation and maintenance**, with the following representations:
   - **As-designed (ideal)**: The DT begins with a **static BIM model** representing the building's geometric and functional design, enriched with semantic annotations for devices, sensors, and control logic.
   - **As-manufactured**: During construction, the DT is updated with **as-built data** (e.g., deviations from design, installed equipment) to reflect the physical state of the building.
   - **As-operated**: In the operational phase, the DT continuously synchronizes with **real-time sensor data** and operational logs to provide an up-to-date virtual representation. The framework supports **runtime updates** to the DT, including adjustments to control policies, sensor configurations, and visualization parameters, ensuring alignment with evolving operational needs. The DT also facilitates **post-occupancy analysis** (e.g., energy performance, occupant behavior) to inform future refurbishments or adaptations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "The DT’s fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Semantic Integration**: **Unified representation** of **static BIM data** and **dynamic runtime data** via **model-driven transformations**,
  - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **Low-latency updates** between physical sensors and the DT to maintain **operational coherence**,
  - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) Metric**: **Quantitative validation** of **semantic alignment** and **operational fidelity** between the DT and physical twin,
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: **Implicit consideration** of **sensor noise, control delays, and environmental variability** through **predictive analytics** (e.g., RL-based optimization in BOREALIS),
  - **Verification and Validation**: **Iterative refinement** of DT models and control logic based on **real-world performance data** and **stakeholder feedback**."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for **technical network connections**, though specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, TCP/IP, RESTful APIs) are not explicitly detailed in the documents. Key connection aspects include:
  - **Device Communication**: **Bidirectional data exchange** between physical sensors/actuators and the DT via **Hono/Ditto endpoints** (e.g., tenant IDs, device IDs),
  - **Data Protocols**: **Standardized messaging formats** (e.g., JSON, CBOR) for **real-time telemetry and control commands**,
  - **Network Architecture**: **Decoupled communication** between **BIM models (design-time)** and **runtime systems (operation-time)** via **middleware abstraction**,
  - **Latency Optimization**: **Low-latency pathways** for **critical control loops** (e.g., HVAC adjustments) to ensure **responsive feedback**."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The DT supports **horizontal integration** through:
  - **Standardized Extension Points**: **Modular interfaces** for **third-party service integration** (e.g., ERP, CMMS, IoT platforms),
  - **Middleware Compliance**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** adherence to **open standards** (e.g., OPC UA, MQTT) for **interoperability** with external systems,
  - **BIM-Centric Data Exchange**: **Semantic alignment** with **AECO standards** (e.g., IFC, COBie) to enable **seamless data sharing** across disciplines,
  - **API-Based Connectivity**: **RESTful or WebSocket interfaces** for **real-time data ingestion** from external sources (e.g., weather APIs, utility grids)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to the following **standards**:
  - **BIM Standards**: **Industry Foundation Classes (IFC)** for **semantic interoperability** and **COBie** for **operational data exchange**,
  - **Middleware Standards**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto compliance** with **open IoT protocols** (e.g., MQTT, OPC UA) for **device connectivity**,
  - **Control Standards**: **BACnet** for **building automation system (BAS) integration** and **JSON-LD** for **semantic data representation**,
  - **AECO Frameworks**: **Unified modeling languages** (e.g., BIM-based metamodels) for **domain-specific semantics** and **model-driven engineering (MDE) transformations**."
]
